# GitHub repo setup (manual)

Complete these in [repo Settings](https://github.com/sawftware-apps/docimprint-sdk/settings) for a 10/10 landing page outside the README.

## About

- **Description:** `Document memory agents can prove — SDK for tamper-evident evidence bundles, citations, and on-chain attestation`
- **Website:** `https://docimprint.com`
- **Topics:** `mcp`, `ai-agents`, `document-intelligence`, `evidence-bundle`, `x402`, `crewai`, `pdf`, `legal-tech`, `base`, `typescript`, `python`

## Social preview

Upload `.github/social-preview.png` (1280×640 recommended) under **Settings → General → Social preview**.

## Releases

Tag `v0.1.2` aligned with npm/PyPI to remove "No releases published" on the repo home page.
